rainbow-chard-and-radicchio-saute.name: Rainbow Chard And Radicchio Sauté
instructions: Cut ribs from chard; chop crosswise into 1-inch pieces (about 4 cups). Slice leaves crosswise into 1-inch strips (about 16 cups).

Melt butter with oil in large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until onion is tender, stirring occasionally, about 4 minutes. Add chard ribs; cover and cook until tender, about 6 minutes. Working in batches, add chard leaves and radicchio, stirring until wilted. Cook uncovered until vegetables are tender, stirring often, 8 to 10 minutes. Stir in 2 tablespoons vinegar and currants, if desired. Season with salt and pepper and more vinegar, if desired.
Using slotted spoon, transfer chard mixture to bowl. Sprinkle pine nuts over.

raspberry-lemon-drop-martini.name: Raspberry Lemon Drop Martini
instructions: Place 8 raspberries, lemon juice, and sugar into a cocktail shaker; mash well with a cocktail muddler. Add vodka and ice. Cover, and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted. Strain into a chilled martini glass; garnish with a lemon wedge and remaining 2 raspberries.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-mashed-po.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs With Mashed Potatoes And Gravy
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-with-mashed-po.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo con puré de papas y gravy

ingredients.item: 8  muslos de pollo ((con piel y con hueso))

instructions: It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
Lava y seca bien los muslos de pollo. Marina con aceite de oliva, sal, pimienta, ajo en polvo, paprika y, si lo deseas, coloca las ramitas de romero fresco encima.
Coloca los muslos en una bandeja para horno, con la piel hacia arriba.
Hornea for 35-40 minutes or until the skin is golden and crispy and the inside boiled (internal temperature 75 been).
Boil potato cubes into a pot with water and salt till they are tender (about 15 minutes).
Escurre el agua y machaca las papas.
Add butter and mix well. It incorporates hot milk little by little, beating up to get a creamy texture.
Sazona con sal y pimienta blanca al gusto.
In a frying pan with medium heat, melt the butter.
Add the flour and mix constantly with a balloon beaker for 1-2 minutes till it takes a light golden color.
Incorpora el caldo de pollo poco a poco, sin dejar de batir, para evitar grumos.
Cocina a fuego medio-bajo hasta que la salsa espese (unos 5-7 minutos).
If you want a more creamy gravy, add the milk and sauona cream with salt, pepper and nutmeg.
Put a couple of chicken thighs onto the plate, with a generous portion of purée of potatoes and drink with hot gravy.

recipe-to-make-sugared-walnuts-comedera.name: Recipe To Make Sugared Walnuts
instructions: Loan the ingredients so you can make the work easier.
We start to prepare these chewed nuts by making an syrup and for that, in a frying pan, add sugar, water, vanilla and cinnamon.
We mix and let them cook for a few minutes till the sugar's completely dissolved.
Bajar el fuego y agrega las nueces.
Se mezcla de vez en cuando para evitar que se peguen.
When the sugar has been caramelized and the nuts are covered, remove from the fire and empty onto a waxed paper.
Wait till I dry up and start pounding to get as far apart as you can.

recipe-to-prepare-chicken-parmesan-comed.name: Recipe To Prepare Chicken Parmesan
instructions: To purify the oven at 180 been 3 or 177 been 3
Peel garlic teeth and cut them
Mix the garlic tooth with olive oil, machar and reserve
En un recipiente vierte el pan rallado y el queso parmesano
Agrega la sal, la pimienta, el ajo en polvo y las finas hierbas
For salsa purify well minced onion and garlic
Agrega la sal y la pimienta
Loan tomatoes and add them to the pot with onion and garlic
Cocina por unos 10 minutos a fuego bajo
Agrega la albahaca y cocina otros 10 minutos
Retira del fuego y reserva
Fits through olive oil with garlic and then bring them to the bowl with frosted bread, cheese and fine olives
Put it to fry in a frying pan with butter for 5 minutes
Filling a plate for the oven and place frying breasts there, have them with some salsa and mozzarella cheese
Hornea por 15 minutos
Retira del horno y disfruta

recipe-to-prepare-coffee-cream-comedera.name: Recipe To Prepare Coffee Cream
recipe-to-prepare-coffee-cream-comedera.original_name: Receta para preparar crema de café
instructions: A pot adds pounding cream and sugar
Coloca a fuego alto mientras revuelves constantemente
Once you have loosed the herb, lower the intensity of the fire and add coffee
Con el fuego muy bajo deja de 20 a 30 minutos removiendo constantemente
Once you have taken good consistency, empty it, with care, into previously sterilized bottles and close them.
Una vez que se hayan enfriado guarda los frascos en el refrigerador

restaurant-style-fries.name: Restaurant-style Fries
instructions: Peel the potatoes. Using a chef's knife or a mandoline, slice the potatoes lengthwise into ¼-inch-thick planks, then cut those into ¼-inch-thick matchsticks.
In a large bowl, combine the 3 cups water, ice, and 2 teaspoons of the salt. Add the potatoes, and let soak for 15 minutes. Drain and rinse well.

Transfer the potatoes to a pot, and add enough water to cover them. Stir in the vinegar and remaining 1 teaspoon salt. Heat over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil, about 8 minutes, or until the potatoes are fork-tender but still slightly firm in the center. Drain and set aside on a wire rack to cool at room temperature until completely cooled, about 30 minutes.

In a cast-iron pot, heat the oil over high heat to 166°C (165°C). Working in 4 batches, to avoid overcrowding, cook the potatoes in the hot oil for about 3 minutes, until light golden. Using a wire spider, remove the potatoes to a wire rack. Reserve the oil in the pot, and set it aside.
Freeze the fried potatoes (still on the wire rack) until frozen solid, for at least 4 hours.
Over high heat, heat the reserved oil in the pot to 191°C (190°C). Fry the potatoes in 4 batches until golden and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Drain the fries on a wire rack. Sprinkle with salt to taste.
Enjoy!

rhubarb-cornmeal-crumb-cake.name: Rhubarb Cornmeal Crumb Cake

ingredients.prep: room temperature, plus more for pan

instructions: Whisk flour, cornmeal, granulated sugar, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Using your fingers, work in butter until pieces are the size of small peas. Using a fork, mis in egg until mixture comes together in varying size clumps. Cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: Crumb can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly butter and flour a 13-by-9" baking dish. Toss rhubarb, ginger, and ¼ cup granulated sugar in a medium bowl.
Whisk cornmeal, baking powder, salt, and 1 cup flour in another medium bowl. Whisk milk and yogurt in a small bowl.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat brown sugar, remaining ½ cup sugar, and 1/2 cup butter until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating to blend between additions.

Reduce speed to low and add dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with milk mixture in 2 additions, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Fold in rhubarb mixture. Scrape batter into prepared pan and scatter crumble topping over.
Bake cake until golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 55–65 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool slightly.

rice-bowls-with-flaky-cod.name: Rice Bowls With Flaky Cod
instructions: Cook eggs in a small saucepan of simmering water for 9 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl of very cold water and let cool until just warm, about 3 minutes. Peel; set aside.

Meanwhile, melt ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat. Cook garlic, tossing occasionally, until lightly browned, 4–5 minutes. Add curry powder, followed by rice and 1¼ cups water. Bring to a simmer, cover, reduce heat to low, and cook until rice is nearly tender, about 15 minutes.

Season fish generously with salt and a pinch of curry powder, if desired. Lay fish over rice and continue to cook, covered, until rice is tender and fish flakes apart when poked with a finger or fork, 8–10 minutes.
Divide yogurt among bowls. Top with fish and rice. Halve eggs and arrange alongside. Top with celery and cilantro. Serve with a lime wedge alongside.

roast-beef-stock.name: Roast Beef Stock
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Roast marrow bones (have your butcher saw them into pieces) in a roasting pan, turning occasionally, until browned, 25–30 minutes. Cut carrots and celery into 3” pieces; add to pan along with onions and garlic. Roast, turning occasionally, until vegetables are brown, 25–30 minutes.

Transfer to a large stockpot; add cold water to cover. Pour off fat from pan, add ½ cup water, and stir, scraping up browned bits; add liquid to pot along with parsley, thyme, bay leaves, and black peppercorns. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer 4 hours, occasionally skimming foam and fat from surface and adding water as needed. Strain.
DO AHEAD: Stock can be made 2 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.

roast-chicken-with-potatoes-and-olives.name: Roast Chicken With Potatoes And Olives

ingredients.item: Crushed red pepper flakes; plus more for serving
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves with tender stems

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Pulse bay leaf, fennel seeds, and ½ tsp. red pepper flakes in spice mill until finely ground.
Toss potatoes, olives, 2 Tbsp. oil, and half of spice mixture in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Place chicken on a rimmed baking sheet and rub with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil; season with salt and pepper and rub with remaining spice mixture.

Arrange potato mixture around chicken. Roast until potatoes are fork-tender, chicken is cooked through, and skin is crisp, 35–45 minutes. Serve chicken and potato mixture topped with parsley, lemon zest, and more red pepper flakes, if desired; spoon pan juices around.

roast-koji-chicken.name: Roast Koji Chicken

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 2 teaspoons morton kosher salt

instructions: Grind koji in a spice mill or a blender to a fine powder. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in salt; set aside.

Starting at the neck end of the chicken, gently slide your fingers between the skin and breast to loosen skin; continue working down the thighs and legs to fully separate skin from meat (be careful not to tear). Rub koji mixture under skin all over meat and inside cavity, distributing evenly. Season outside of chicken generously with pepper and place on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Chill at least 8 hours and up to 2 days, leaving uncovered up to 24 hours, then loosely covering if chilling longer.
Let chicken sit at room temperature 45 minutes.

Preheat oven to 425°. Roast chicken until skin is starting to brown all over, 15–20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue roasting chicken until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of a thigh registers 165°, 40–45 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest at least 15 minutes before carving.

roasted-butternut-squash-with-brown-suga.name: Roasted Butternut Squash With Brown Sugar
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a large baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Combine squash, olive oil, brown sugar, sea salt, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper in a large bowl; toss until squash is evenly coated. Spread squash in an even layer onto the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven, turning midway through, until edges are lightly browned and centers are tender, 40 to 45 minutes. Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with nuts.

roasted-cucumber-sandwiches.name: Roasted Cucumber Sandwiches

ingredients.item: Labneh (lebanese yogurt cheese) or greek-style yogurt
Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. If using English cucumbers, split lengthwise and remove seeds (leave other varieties whole). Arrange cucumbers on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet. (If using English cucumbers, arrange cut side down.) Brush with melted butter. Roast cucumbers until crisp-tender, about 15 minutes. Transfer cucumbers to a paper towel-lined plate; chill until cold.

Cut Japanese or Persian cucumbers lengthwise in half. Cut hothouse cucumber halves lengthwise in half. Slice crosswise into 1/4"-thick pieces. Whisk labneh and next 5 ingredients in a large bowl. Stir in sliced cucumbers and 1 tablespoon lemon juice. Season filling to taste with salt, pepper, and more lemon juice, if desired.

Brush cut sides of focaccia or rolls with olive oil; place on a baking sheet and toast in a 400° oven until just crispy and lightly browned, 3-5 minutes. Divide filling among focaccia bottoms, cover with tops, and cut each into 4 sandwiches (or divide filling among rolls).

roasted-eggplant-and-pickled-beet-sandwi.name: Roasted Eggplant And Pickled Beet Sandwiches

ingredients.item: Mixed tender fresh herb leaves (such as flat-leaf parsley

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Place eggplant slices on a large rimmed baking sheet and rub both sides with oil. Season with paprika, salt, and pepper. Roast until golden and tender, 30-40 minutes.
Whisk garlic, mayonnaise, and vinegar in a small bowl; set aside.
Toss scallions, herbs, beets, olives, capers, and oil in a medium bowl to combine.
Spread cut sides of focaccia with garlic mayo. Build sandwiches with focaccia, eggplant, feta, and beet salad.
DO AHEAD: Eggplant can be roasted 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

roasted-peppers-with-parm-breadcrumbs.name: Roasted Peppers With Parm Breadcrumbs

ingredients.item: . aleppo-style or other mild red pepper flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Place 3 bell peppers upright on a cutting board. Working around stems and avoiding the seedy center, slice straight downward to remove 4 lobes from each pepper.
Arrange pepper lobes skin sides down on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil; season with ½ tsp. salt.
Gently mix 1 cup panko, ½ cup Parmesan, 1 tsp. garlic powder, 2 Tbsp. oil, and remaining ¼ tsp. salt with your hands in a medium bowl.
Using your fingertips, pat about 2 Tbsp. breadcrumb mixture into each piece of pepper. Drizzle peppers with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil.
Bake peppers until bottoms are deeply browned and breadcrumbs are golden, 18–22 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, slice 1 lemon into wedges and set aside. Pick leaves from 4 parsley sprigs and coarsely chop.
Transfer peppers to a platter. Top with red pepper and parsley. Serve with lemon wedges alongside.

roasted-poultry-stock.name: Roasted Poultry Stock

ingredients.prep: back (if you spatchcocked your bird), and giblets

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Divide turkey parts, onions, carrots, celery, and garlic between 2 rimmed baking sheets. Drizzle with oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Roast, turning once, until vegetables are soft and caramelized (they should stick slightly to pans), 45–50 minutes.

Transfer to a large pot and add thyme, bay leaves, peppercorns, and 16 cups water. Pour ¼ cup water into each baking sheet, scraping up any browned bits; add to pot. Bring to a simmer and cook until stock is deep golden brown and reduced to about 12 cups, about 1½ hours. Strain into containers. Let cool; cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: Stock can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 3 months.

roasted-rack-of-lamb.name: Roasted Rack Of Lamb
instructions: Combine bread crumbs, garlic, rosemary, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in a small bowl; stir in 2 tablespoons olive oil to moisten the mixture. Set aside.
Season rack of lamb all over with 1 teaspoon salt and 1 teaspoon pepper.
Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large heavy oven-proof skillet over high heat. Add lamb and sear on all sides, about 1 to 2 minutes: set lamb aside for a few minutes.
Brush lamb with mustard and roll in bread crumb mixture until evenly coated. Cover the ends of the bones with foil to prevent charring.

Arrange the breaded rack of lamb bone-side down in the same skillet. Roast in preheated oven for 12 to 18 minutes for medium; an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 54°C (54 degrees C), or continue to cook to desired doneness.
Remove lamb from the skillet and allow to rest for 5 to 7 minutes, loosely covered with foil, before carving between the ribs.

roasted-salmon.name: Roasted Salmon
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°. Combine shallot, half of orange zest, half of lemon zest, and 1 Tbsp. oil in a small baking dish just large enough to fit salmon. Season salmon with salt and coat with zest mixture. Bake fish until fillet is just opaque in the center and flakes with a fork, 30–35 minutes.

Meanwhile, mix cilantro, parsley, garlic, paprika, remaining zests, and ½ cup oil in a medium bowl. Stir in orange and lemon juice and season citrus salsa verde with salt just before spooning over fish.

roscon-de-reyes-in-air-fryer-step-by-ste.name: Roscon De Reyes In Air Fryer step by step
roscon-de-reyes-in-air-fryer-step-by-ste.original_name: Roscón de Reyes en Freidora de Aire paso a paso

ingredients.item: 2 y 1/2 cucharadas de agua de azahar
Fairy skin with 1 big lemon and 1 orange

instructions: First, we will combine a small portion of the 250 ml tibia milk with about 2 or 3 tablespoons of force flour. Then we add 25 g of fresh yeast, and you have to cut and mix with the earlier mixture. Now, we cover the mixture and let it stand for about 15 or 20 minutes at a warm place, enabling them to ferment properly.

Once our startup mass has been properly fermented, we proceed to prepare the main mass in a large bowl. We added the remaining flour and, little by little, we incorporated the other ingredients and mixed after each: sugar, lemon and orange frilling, a pint of salt, milk, 2 eggs, the starter mass we had left fermenting in another bowl, the azahar water and finally the melted butter. We mix all these ingredients up to get a mass that separates itself from the walls of the bowl.

Now, let's get the dough ready for later fermentation. On a smooth and chewed surface with flour, we began to amass the dough with our hands for a few minutes. If necessary, we add some more flour to make sure that the dough is easy to work with. We shape the dough and turn it into a ball and once it's well matted, we place it into an hermetic vessel or we cover it with one or two moist tissues. We let the dough stand at a warm place with no air currents for about two hours. The inside of the oven or microwave, for example, can be used for this purpose.

After about two hours, the mass should have doubled its size. We remove it from the container and place it on a smooth surface previously filled with flour. With this quantity of mass, we can make two medium necks that can fit us in our frying air without problems. To do this we divide the mass into two parts and amassed each of them, giving them shape and creating a hole at the centre with their fingers. Keep in mind that the hole will be reduced a little while while baking, so it's best to make it a little bigger at first. Then we let them put them back back up for about an hour and make sure we cover them well. A useful trick is to preheat the air fryer at 50 ″ 3 ″, turn it off and then put the pink inside to keep it hot while resting. Since only one will suit you, if you do two it's better to get them into the oven and put them out for the lifting.

When the second hour goes by, the most fun time will come to decorate the Roscón de Reyes. To do this we paint with an egg with a Silicone brush. We smell granulated sugar with a few drops of water and sprinkle it onto the pink. We place frosted fruit at our best and optionally laminated or granillo almond.

It purifies frying at 1600 ° C for 5 minutes. Although it will depend on our frying model, it usually requires a baking time from 20- 30 minutes at 160ºC. Our recommendation's that you watch him and open him after 10-15 minutes. If you see that it's already golden but with a sharp knife, it's still moist to cover with aluminum paper so that it doesn't burn up and keeps baking. Below we give you some advice about baking in air fryers. When you see that's ready get him out and let him cool down an air grid.

rum-balls.name: Rum Balls
instructions: Combine vanilla wafers, nuts, 3/4 cup confectioners' sugar, and cocoa in a large bowl.
Mix in rum and corn syrup until well combined.
Shape dough into 1-inch balls; roll in confectioners' sugar to coat.
Store rum balls in an airtight container for 2 to 3 days to develop flavor. Roll them again in confectioners' sugar before serving.

rumchata-pudding-shots.name: Rumchata Pudding Shots

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Mix milk, rum cream liqueur, and pudding mix together in a bowl until thickened.
Gently stir whipped topping into the pudding mixture.
Spoon into disposable shot cups and place on a plate.
Freeze until chilled and set, at least 3 hours.

russian-dressing.name: Russian Dressing
instructions: Mix mayonnaise, relish, ketchup, lemon juice, horseradish, onion powder, and Worcestershire sauce in a small bowl; season with salt.

7-ravioli-recipes-that-will-conquer-you-.name: 7 Ravioli Recipes That Will Conquer You
7-ravioli-recipes-that-will-conquer-you-.original_name: 7 recetas de ravioli que te van a conquistar

ingredients.item: 500 g of fresh or frozen mushrooms
1 taza de hojas frescas de salvia (25g)

instructions: Cocinamos los ravioli siguiendo las instrucciones del paquete y los escurrimos.
In a frying pan, we heat up some olive oil with medium heat and add clear and cut mushrooms. We cook for about 5 minutes till they are soft and golden.
We add the cream to the mushrooms and mix well. We cook for about 2 minutes till the sauce's hot.
We added minced sage and minced parsley to the mushroom and cream sauce. We mix well.
We mix ravioli with mushroom sauce, sage and parsley and serve in individual plates.
We sprinkle with a little more minced parsley and some fresh sage leaves and enjoy our delicious ravioli plate with mushroom sauce.
